content.verdict: Designed by Brazilian architect Marcio Kogan of Studio MK27, Patina is the Maldives' most design-forward resort and Kim Kardashian's honeymoon pick. Ninety villas in North Malé's Fari Islands share an inspired Fari Marina Village with 12 restaurants and Flow spa. It is urban-sophisticated luxury for couples who want more than a coconut palm.
content.best_room: The One-Bedroom Water Pool Villa — sleek concrete-and-wood minimalism, private infinity pool, curved roof, and floor-to-ceiling lagoon views. Beach lovers should choose a Two-Bedroom Beach Pool Villa with garden.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 45-minute luxury speedboat from Malé. Marina Village welcome, design tour of villa, sunset at Helios rooftop bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Fari Marina Village
itinerary_7_nights.description: Brunch at Roots, afternoon art walk (Patina curates site-specific installations), Wagyu dinner at Koma by Chef Ken Oringer.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Lagoon Adventures
itinerary_7_nights.description: Snorkel safari to find manta rays, Seabob session in lagoon, sunset oyster and Champagne at Veli.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Flow Spa Ritual
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full morning couples wellness journey — sound bath, hammam, massage. Afternoon pool, fire-dining at Portuguese restaurant Tum Tum.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Island Picnic
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat to a private sandbank for a chef-curated picnic, evening DJ set at Helios for the sunset crowd.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Culinary Deep Dive
itinerary_7_nights.description: Cooking class, Japanese tasting menu at Koma, post-dinner cocktails at Fari Beach Club.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Yoga session, final brunch at Roots, speedboat back to Malé.

caveats: Resort shares the island cluster with Ritz-Carlton — not a single-island experience
Design minimalism is not to every taste
Prices for specialty dining add up quickly

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — especially for design-savvy couples who want dining variety and nightlife alongside privacy.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: December–April for dry season. Fari Marina is lively year-round.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 4–6 months, longer for Christmas and February peak.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — family-friendly with a kids club, but villas are private and couples-focused.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: One-Bedroom Water Pool Villa for honeymooners.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 45-minute speedboat transfer from Velana International Airport (MLE).
